title: expression with <boolean> = NOT <boolean> returns a syntax error but NOT <boolean> = <boolean> not
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE BOOLTBL2 (f1 UInt8 NOT NULL, f2 Int32 DEFAULT 0);
INSERT INTO BOOLTBL2 (f1, f2) VALUES (0, NULL);
SELECT f1 FROM BOOLTBL2 WHERE f1 = NOT 1;
SELECT f2 FROM BOOLTBL2 WHERE NOT f1 = NOT 0;
